name: finance-cron
description: Trading-day calendar utilities for financial markets (US, CN, HK). Identifies trading days and helps plan schedules - use with /loop for actual task execution.

commands.name: check
commands.description: Check if a date is a trading day for a market

commands.name: next
commands.description: Show next N trading days for a market

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Sync latest trading calendar from data sources

commands.name: add
commands.description: Plan a trading-day-aware task (shows next run time, use /loop for actual execution)
